$comment: Request body for POST /api/tasks/:id/approve. Spec: docs/05-task-runner/03-hitl-gate.md §JSON Schemas. Version 1.
title: HITL Approve Request Body

dbRowVersion.description: Optimistic-concurrency token captured from the task at the time the operator opened the review (PRD §8.4).

note.description: Optional approval note. Truncated to 80 chars in the status_change.reason field by reasons.approvedWithNote; full text stays in this request body only.
